editorial_direction.house_style: HNN-inspired immediacy and community awareness with Archive evidence discipline

gateways.title: Start Here
gateways.reader_purpose: Orient a first-time visitor without requiring prior knowledge of Star Atlas.

gateways.title: The Star Atlas Universe
gateways.reader_purpose: Explore Galia, its factions, peoples, conflicts, places and canon.

gateways.title: Games and Experiences
gateways.reader_purpose: Understand the playable products, tests and product families.

gateways.title: Ships and Economy
gateways.reader_purpose: Explore ships, ownership, tokens, resources, production and trade.

gateways.title: History
gateways.reader_purpose: Follow the project through major eras, releases, setbacks and turning points.

gateways.title: People and Community
gateways.reader_purpose: Meet the players, guilds, creators, journalists and community traditions.

gateways.title: Governance and Institutions
gateways.reader_purpose: Understand ATMTA, the DAO, Foundation, Council and consequential proposals.

gateways.title: Research the Archive
gateways.reader_purpose: Reach detailed ledgers, registries, evidence records and preserved sources.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What is Star Atlas, and what can someone actually experience?
missing_requirements: Create a concise cross-domain identity packet that separates game, universe, company, community and governance ecosystem.
Refresh the dated current-experience inventory immediately before drafting.

foundational_pages.working_title: A Brief History of Star Atlas
foundational_pages.reader_question: How did Star Atlas evolve from its public beginnings into its present product ecosystem?
missing_requirements: Present curator-defined period boundaries as an interpretive structure rather than official eras.

foundational_pages.working_title: Star Atlas Today: Ways to Experience the Universe
foundational_pages.reader_question: What products, tests and community experiences are available now?
missing_requirements: Run a freshness check before every publication revision.
Use an explicit as-of date and avoid implying continuous availability.

foundational_pages.working_title: The Turning Points That Shaped Star Atlas
foundational_pages.reader_question: Which moments most changed the direction of the project and its community?
missing_requirements: Promote event-level evidence packets for corporate contraction, FTX exposure, major product transitions and community responses.
Separate contemporary reporting from later retrospective interpretation.

foundational_pages.reader_question: Where does Star Atlas take place, and what defines its universe?
missing_requirements: Keep historical snapshot qualifications in a short canon note rather than the narrative opening.

foundational_pages.working_title: The Three Factions of Star Atlas
foundational_pages.reader_question: What distinguishes MUD, ONI and Ustur?
missing_requirements: Avoid reducing species, governments and institutions to faction aliases.

foundational_pages.reader_question: Who inhabits Galia beyond the three faction labels?
missing_requirements: Retain uneven source-depth qualifications without turning them into the central story.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What conflict reshaped relations among the major powers of Galia?
missing_requirements: Keep conflicting or incomplete chronology visible in end notes.

foundational_pages.working_title: The Council of Peace and Galia's Fragile Order
foundational_pages.reader_question: How did the major factions try to govern the peace after war?
missing_requirements: Distinguish the lore institution from the real-world Star Atlas Council.

foundational_pages.reader_question: Which corporations, orders and institutions shape life beyond the factions?
missing_requirements: Promote the highest-value lore corporations, organizations and institutions from normalized entities into reviewed Knowledge.
Resolve hierarchy and alias mappings before public synthesis.

foundational_pages.working_title: How Star Atlas Lore and Canon Evolved
foundational_pages.reader_question: How has the published universe changed across repositories, narratives and official releases?
missing_requirements: Create a narrative canon-publication chronology.
Reconcile the most material source divergences without rewriting historical terminology.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How did Star Atlas strategy gameplay evolve from passive fleets into Starbased?
missing_requirements: Center the player experience and turning points rather than lifecycle classification.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What does SAGE refer to, and how do its distinct products relate?
missing_requirements: Keep SAGE Labs, Starbased, SAGE 3D and C4 as distinct stages or products rather than aliases.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How did Star Atlas begin opening its high-fidelity universe to players?
missing_requirements: Separate the historical Showroom identity from later Unreal client surfaces.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What is Holosim, and what did it let players test?
missing_requirements: Keep simulated zATLAS and pre-mainnet features separate from production-network claims.

foundational_pages.working_title: Escape Velocity and the First On-Chain Experiments
foundational_pages.reader_question: Why did Escape Velocity matter to the development of on-chain gameplay?
missing_requirements: Create a dedicated Escape Velocity lifecycle and incident history.
Reconcile transaction and participation metrics with their original sources.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How did the marketplace become a central Star Atlas product?
missing_requirements: Keep the 2021 market surface distinct from its 2022 replacement.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What are Star Atlas ships, and how are they organized across manufacturers, sizes and roles?
missing_requirements: Promote a canonical ship and manufacturer registry from the curated 63-ship campaign.
Preserve that Starbased base values may be rebased, Holosim uses different values and components may modify individual ships.

foundational_pages.reader_question: Why does Star Atlas use two principal tokens, and how have their roles changed?
missing_requirements: Lead with player and ecosystem use rather than measurement limitations.
Keep historical supply claims dated and attributed.

foundational_pages.working_title: How the Star Atlas Player Economy Developed
foundational_pages.reader_question: How did rewards, production, markets and player activity change over time?
missing_requirements: Create a cross-product economic lifecycle packet covering SCORE emissions, SAGE resources, crafting, marketplace changes and economic reports.
Separate official measurements from independent verification.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How do resources move through the Star Atlas strategy economy?
missing_requirements: Promote separate current and historical mechanics for mining, crafting, R4 and trade.
Avoid projecting one product's recipes or values into another.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What does owning a Star Atlas asset mean across markets and game surfaces?
missing_requirements: Create a reviewed asset-identity and utility history.
Separate ownership, market listing, game utility and current accessibility.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How did players become organizers, creators, critics and institution builders?
missing_requirements: Keep the first edition thematic rather than biographical.
Do not infer identity, current membership or authority from display names or guild tags.

foundational_pages.working_title: A History of Star Atlas Guilds and DACs
foundational_pages.reader_question: How did guilds organize before the full game existed?
missing_requirements: Create dated guild evidence packets for Aephia, Agora, Dark Matter, Rome, The Vanguard and other well-supported organizations.
Separate self-description, observed activity, rivalry claims and present status.

foundational_pages.working_title: Atlas Brew and the Town Hall Tradition
foundational_pages.reader_question: Where did the community and team gather to discuss the project in public?
missing_requirements: Use episode and timestamp provenance without making unknown speakers the article's main concern.

foundational_pages.working_title: Community Journalism and Star Atlas Media
foundational_pages.reader_question: Who documented and interpreted Star Atlas outside official channels?
missing_requirements: Keep source affiliations, editorial roles and original reporting distinct.
Do not center Intergalactic Herald in the present publication portfolio.

foundational_pages.reader_question: Which gatherings and competitions became part of Star Atlas community life?
missing_requirements: Promote occurrence evidence, dates, organizers, results and surviving media for selected events.
Do not treat an announcement or schedule as proof that an event occurred.

foundational_pages.reader_question: What are ATMTA, the DAO, Foundation and Council, and how do their roles differ?
missing_requirements: Merge the two overlapping institutional prototypes.
Describe institutional design as documented rather than continuously verified current operation.

foundational_pages.working_title: How Proposals Changed the Star Atlas Ecosystem
foundational_pages.reader_question: Which governance decisions materially changed institutions, programs or products?
missing_requirements: Create a significance-ranked proposal case-study packet.
Choose cases based on institutional consequence rather than archival completeness.
Keep passage, payment, implementation and outcome separate.

foundational_pages.reader_question: How do Solana, Unreal Engine and on-chain programs support different parts of Star Atlas?
missing_requirements: Create a reader-level architecture packet that separates product surfaces, programs, game IDs, APIs and developer tools.
Do not infer undocumented architecture or deployed-state equivalence.

dossier_series.entry_rule: Create only after canonical taxonomy promotion and alias reconciliation.
One page per narrow product, build or program with a dated lifecycle.
Promote curated identities before public pages; keep game-specific stat sets distinct.
Require identity-specific evidence and dated role or affiliation support.
Require occurrence evidence; announcements alone are insufficient.

research_collection.title: Governance Failure and Termination Casebook
research_collection.public_role: Advanced governance research, not an entrance article

research_collection.title: Treasury Authorization and Payment Research
research_collection.public_role: Research collection until supported award and payment case studies are ready
